name: Apple Graham Cracker Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Brown Sugar or Maple Syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the graham crackers to make fine crumbs.
2. Mix the crumbs with brown sugar and chopped walnuts; set aside.
3. Peel, core, and slice the apples.
4. Arrange the apple slices in a buttered 8-inch baking dish in alternate layers with the crumb mixture.
5. Dot the top with butter.
6. Pour lemon juice and water over all.
7. Sprinkle with nutmeg.
8. Cover and bake in a slow oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 30 minutes, until the apples are cooked to a jelly.
9. Serve hot or cold with cream or whipped cream.
